race.comment: Tricky race to see us out. REINE OF NINE (13) caught the eye last start when closing strongly into third at long odds. Peaking now and gets in light with the claim, though will likely get a long way back from the draw. If the pace is genuine, she can reel them in late. SO POLITE (10) has good early speed and should be even sharper away with the blinkers applied. Finally draws a gate fourth-up and should give plenty of cheek. STEEL TSUNAMI (15) returns and while he's yet to score fresh, he is a track and trip winner. Draws well for Crowther and is in the mix. KALASEC (2) has run well fresh without winning and strips fitter for two trials. Won't mind the softer conditions. HERE COMES HOGAN (9) comes here off a good win in the wet at Horsham. Gets in well with the 3kg claim and is worth keeping safe.
